nasb.text: Even saying these things, with difficulty they restrained the crowds from offering sacrifice to them.

esv.text: Even with these words they scarcely restrained the people from offering sacrifice to them.

cnv.text: 兩人說完了這些話，這才阻止群眾，不向他們獻祭。

ccb.text: 保罗和巴拿巴说了这些话，才勉强制止住向他们献祭的人群。

csbs.text: 两个人说了这些话，好不容易才阻止众人向他们献祭。
